microsoft_ft: Led **pre-sales-style technical education** for enterprise partner integrations (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), translating platform capabilities into business value and driving **$14M+** in measurable impact across Azure's resilience program.

Built a 0→1 internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and **RESTful API integrations** that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled drill capacity across sovereign and commercial cloud environments.

Served as **cross-functional bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating engineering, security, and partner teams to meet strict compliance and evaluation requirements.

Deployed an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing annual drill throughput by 21% — demonstrating hands-on automation engineering alongside product leadership.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable POC-style validation model for continuous security assurance.
microsoft_2023: Championed **developer tool adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting live product demos and technical training sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Conducted 11+ discovery interviews with Azure engineering teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** — translating customer feedback into actionable product requirements.

Improved **semantic search** retrieval fidelity by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered search tool, reducing lookup time by 83% for developer and security workflows.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ engineering teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M** in accelerated revenue.

Ran structured discovery with 20+ service teams to map 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring a **POC-to-production** evaluation process for internal developer tooling.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface automation gaps and operational toil signals across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact integrations and allocate engineering resources against measurable outcomes.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit** pilot fleet, mapping software dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — demonstrating hands-on systems integration and technical troubleshooting under production constraints.

Implemented automated **CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil for robotics developer teams.

Facilitated Agile sprint ceremonies and triaged **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and maintaining delivery velocity during a complex cross-functional platform migration.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end sales workflow, managing scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM integration that reduced manual handoff errors.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence and Google Business profile to align messaging with buyer intent.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and deliver pricing model recommendations to leadership, demonstrating data-driven business value communication.

skills_priority: Pre-Sales & Solutions Engineering: product demos, POC support, technical objection handling, customer discovery
Software Supply Chain & Security: open source risk, vulnerability management, developer security tooling
Languages & Ecosystems: Python, JavaScript, YAML, REST APIs, Git/GitHub
Developer Tools & Integrations: CI/CD, package managers (npm/PyPI), semantic search, AI agents
Cross-Functional Execution: stakeholder alignment, product feedback loops, Customer Success collaboration
Technical PM/SA: roadmapping, requirements definition, Agile/Scrum, OKRs, Power BI
tailoring_notes: Wove 'POC' (proof of concept) language into microsoft_ft bullet 5 and microsoft_2022 bullet 2 — directly mirrors JD's 'Support Proof of Concepts that align with customer requirements.'

Used 'pre-sales technical education' and 'translating platform capabilities into business value' in microsoft_ft bullet 1 — mirrors JD's 'translate customer requirements to capabilities, emphasizing business value.'

Inserted 'RESTful API integrations' in microsoft_ft bullet 2 and 'CI/CD pipelines' + 'package managers (npm/PyPI)' in skills — directly echoes JD's required technical background in APIs, source control, and package ecosystems.
Used 'developer tool adoption' and 'live product demos' in microsoft_2023 bullet 1 — mirrors JD's 'Lead discussions and product demonstrations to showcase capabilities.'
Framed microsoft_2023 bullet 2 around translating customer feedback into roadmap — mirrors JD's 'Distill and communicate customer needs and product feedback to Product Management and Engineering.'
